page_content:
JAPN - Japanese

JAPN401 Readings in Modern Japanese Literature (3 Credits) Development of advanced reading, vocabulary, grammar, and translation skills through selected readings in Japanese drawn primarily from modern literature. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in JAPN302; or permission of instructor.

ITAL436 Italian Cinema I: Neorealism (3 Credits) Explores representations of Italy in cinema with special focus on identity formation and the movement of Italian neorealism and post neorealism. Taught in English. Cross-listed with: CINE441. Credit Only Granted for: CINE441, FILM441 or ITAL436. Formerly: FILM441.

JAPN402 Readings in Japanese Cultural Studies (3 Credits) Development of advanced reading, vocabulary, grammar, and translation skills through selected readings in Japanese drawn from the ﬁelds of history, social sciences, cultural studies, ﬁlm studies, and popular culture. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in JAPN302; or permission of instructor.
